title: Gymnocactus goldii
taxonomy: Gymnocactus goldii is a synonym for the plant species Mammillaria goldii, which is a species of cactus within the Mammillaria genus. The Mammillaria genus is classified under the family Cactaceae, commonly known as cacti or prickly-pear cacti. The Cactaceae family is part of the order Caryophyllales, which is a group of flowering plants. This classification is based on botanical and genetic research. The species Mammillaria goldii is native to Mexico.
